name: InjectiveLens Agent Guard
description: Blocks high-risk AI trading actions before execution, binds the decision to evidence, simulates a safer trade, and verifies an assessment proof.

skills.name: Pre-flight Trade Action
skills.description: Parse a natural-language trade request and return an allow/warn/block decision with evidence.

skills.name: Get Injective Account State
skills.description: Read account and subaccount context through the configured read-only adapter.

skills.name: Get Market Snapshot
skills.description: Read Injective market context used by the risk decision.

skills.name: Get Open Positions
skills.description: Read open position context for the requested subaccount.

skills.name: Simulate Safer Trade
skills.description: Return a lower-risk trade proposal without placing an order.

skills.name: Get Latest Assessment
skills.description: Return the latest persisted assessment and proof status when available.

skills.name: Record Assessment Projection
skills.description: Read-only MCP projection of the proof-recording boundary; it does not mutate chain or local state.
